name: Mohenjo-daro
notes: Largest Indus city; primary seal corpus source for CISI India vol.

name: Harappa
notes: Type site; all Harappan phases represented.

name: Dholavira
notes: Famous Dholavira signboard inscription. UNESCO World Heritage 2021.

name: Lothal
notes: Major port site; extensive seal and bead corpus.

name: Kalibangan
notes: Important for early phase script evidence.

name: Rakhigarhi
notes: Largest Harappan site by area; ongoing excavations.
